summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Task requires TDD with tests; none provided or run. (2) Workflow references non-existent files (package.json, config/license_config.json) and will fail on `act`. (3) No test fixture setup or act-result.txt capture as explicitly required. (4) `continue-on-error: true` masks failures. Script is well-structured (type hints, modularity, error handling) but workflow doesn't invoke it meaningfully. Workflow lacks required test harness, verification of output, and job status assertions.
